untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires 12-month lookback reference point analysis (low/center/high) and differentiated gap vs non-gap performance tracking across historical periods. This multi-timeframe statistical comparison cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The avg_rise values (H31%, H21%, L19%, C18%, L21%, C18%, H20%, H18%) appear to be historical regime-dependent outcomes rather than actionable entry/exit thresholds. Recommend implementing as separate module with rolling 252-day window analysis.
